sop.title: Testing text entry across Notepad and online editor

steps.description: User opened a test file in Notepad and typed repetitive 'test' text. Document contains various project-related items (Greeting Message, Gmail, Prompts, .env, etc.)
User switched to Windows Terminal (PowerShell) briefly, likely to check something or switch between apps

steps.action: Return to Notepad and continue typing
steps.description: User returned to Notepad and continued adding repetitive 'test' text. Document grew from ~25 lines to 49 lines (83 to 168 characters)
User opened online notepad (onlinenotepad.org) in Chrome. Word count shows initial state was 45 words, then reset to 0, then gradually increased to 12 and 19 words as user typed
User switched to Cursor IDE and opened SKILL.md file in the hermes-multi-agent project. The file appears to be documentation about a skill pipeline for capturing screen data

sop.notes: The workflow appears to be testing text entry across different editors (local Notepad, browser-based online notepad) - possibly as part of testing screenpipe capture capabilities. The final step opens a project file related to screen capture/skills pipeline, suggesting this was a test of the capture system itself.
